name: Stone Jali Screens

name: Temple Construction Stone
description: Complete temple construction materials in Jaisalmer sandstone. From foundational blocks to intricate shikhara carvings, mandap columns, deity platforms and decorative elements — all in the golden stone revered in Indian temple architecture for centuries.

specifications.Applications: Walls, Pillars, Shikhara, Mandap, Flooring, Jali

faqs.q: Do you supply complete temple stone packages?
faqs.a: Yes, we supply complete material sets for temples from foundation to shikhara. We work with temple architects and Agama Shastra consultants.
